parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ video_id: $json[0].id, user_id: $json[0].user_id, topic: $json[0].topic || $json[0].title, promp: $json[0].promp || '', voice_id: $json[0].voice_id || 'nb-NO-FinnNeural', platform: $json[0].platform || 'youtube', aspect_ratio: $json[0].aspect_ratio || '9:16', language: $json[0].language || 'nb', target_audience: $json[0].target_audience || 'general', action: 'retry' }) }}
